content.rendered:
Accompanying consulting that redesigns organizational structure and decision design according to changes in business phases in parallel with management. With a medium-term program of 3 to 6 months, we support not only the rewriting of organizational charts, but also the establishment of operations.

Challenges this program solves

“Organizations are stuck”, “decision-making is slow”, “top talent is leaving” - these problems are not solved by superficial measures. It is necessary to comprehensively review the organizational structure, decision-making authority, evaluation system, and communication design. The Org Design Lab will execute this integrated redesign alongside management.

Unique approach

Leveraging the Nordic Adaptive Organization Model, a proprietary framework that blends Nordic flat organization knowledge with the realities of Japanese companies. It runs parallel not only to theory, but also to implementation and fixation.

Program Structure

Phase 1 (1 month): Status Diagnosis and Directional Agreement. Phase 2 (2-3 months): New organizational design and pilot operation. Phase 3 (2-3 months): Company-wide deployment and retention support. Define specific deliverables for each phase.

acf.subtitle: Redesign your organization to “move”
acf.features:
Accompanying 3-6 months | Bi-weekly management sessions + monthly company-wide expansion, running parallel from design to fixation.Ongoing engagement rather than spot consulting.
Decision Matrix | A unique frame that evolves RACI to show who decides what.Full visibility into permissions in your organization.
Governance restructuring | Reviewing the meeting structure, reporting line, and KPI design all at once.Integrated redesign of fragmented mechanisms.
Manager Training | Developing managers to function in the new organization.6-month continuing program from skill acquisition to operational retention.
Transformation Communication Design | Messaging design when communicating organizational changes to employees.Minimize resistance and maximize satisfaction.
Follow-up review after half a year | Session to check and improve retention status as of 6 months after the end of the program.
acf.pricing_plans:
Foundation | ¥6,000,000 ~ | 3 Months, Executive Escort, Org Design Document, Monthly Review
Full Program | ¥12,000,000 ~ | 6 Months, Manager Training, Operations Retention Support, KPI Design Support, Half Year Review
Enterprise | ¥24,000,000 ~ | 9-12 months, multi-site deployment, parallel running to both management and the field, dedicated team deployment
acf.faq:
What size of company are you targeting? | It mainly targets companies with a scale of 50 to 500 people, but it can be deployed on a business unit basis even at a scale larger than that.Recently, we have introduced 3,000 companies to specific business units.
How is it different from an existing org consult? | It is characterized by a combination of Nordic-style flat organization knowledge and support for retention in practical operations.Many organizational consultancies end with “until design”, but we run in parallel “until fixation”.
The management is busy and I can't take the time? | Designed for minimal engagement of 2 hours per month + 1 hour bi-weekly.Be prepared to make the biggest decisions in the shortest amount of time.
Do you need an internal change agent? | It's not mandatory, but you'll need a point of contact who can continue to attend each session (around 30% of the time).

content.rendered:
A two-week consulting program that diagnoses team culture under remote and hybrid work and articulates operational improvement priorities. Based on the proprietary Nordic Remote Index framework, we visualize the reality of the organization in three layers: hearing, observation, and survey.

Challenges this program solves

Several years have passed since the remote deployment, and more and more organizations feel that it is "not working at all". Too many meetings, no chatter, no rookies - we systematically diagnose the structural challenges behind these individual issues with our own framework.

Diagnostic Triple Layer Structure

Tier 1: Interviews with executives and managers (10-15 people). Tier 2: All Employees Survey (32 items, Nordic Remote Index). Layer 3: Direct observation of key meetings and communications. By integrating the three layers, both superficial and deep layers can be seen.

DELIVERABLES

Diagnostic report (pages 30-50), prioritized action list, 90-day execution roadmap, 1 follow-up session (after 3 months). Presentation materials for management are also prepared separately.

acf.subtitle: Remote Culture Health Check
acf.features:
2-week intensive program | 14 days from kickoff to debriefing.Designed to match the decision-making speed of management.Approximately 4 weeks of involvement, including prior preparation.
Nordic Remote Index | Diagnose an organization with 32 evaluation axes extracted from the operational examples of Nordic companies.Covers the four areas of time, place, relationships, and decision making.
Execution Roadmap | Provides a 90-day plan with actions arranged on three axes: priority, difficulty, and expected effect.With monthly progress checkpoints.
Three-layer diagnosis of hearing + observation + survey | Three-dimensional understanding of the actual situation of tissues that cannot be seen by a single method.
Management Report | In addition to the 30-50 page diagnostic report, a summary version (10 pages) for management is also available.
Follow-up after 3 months | Session to check the status of action execution after diagnosis.Suggested trajectory corrections as needed.
acf.pricing_plans:
Standard | ¥1,200,000 | Up to 100 employees, 2 weeks, 1 briefing, 90-day roadmap
Plus | ¥2,400,000 | Up to 300 employees, 3 weeks, 1 midterm review, 2 briefings, executive presentation
Enterprise | ¥4,800,000 ~ | Up to 1000 employees, 4 weeks, rollout session for all managers, re-diagnosis after 6 months
acf.faq:
Can I request for an organization that is not completely remote? | Yes, even for hybrid and work-centric organizations, the diagnostic axis is tailored to each.Rather, hybrid models have more complex challenges and are often more valuable for diagnosis.
Is it possible to diagnose including overseas bases? | Available in English and Swedish.Please contact us in advance.We also have expertise in cultural alignment for multinational teams.
Can I also request implementation assistance after diagnosis? | Yes, implementation support based on diagnostic results is available through the Org Design Lab program.Please contact us if you wish to continue running with us.
What about confidentiality? | Perform the diagnosis after concluding the NDA.The results of the diagnosis will only be disclosed to the requesting company, and permission will be obtained in advance if it is published as an example of another company.

content.rendered:
A cloud tool that provides numerical visibility into the psychological safety of a team. Automate monthly surveys, view heat maps on org charts, and suggest improvement actions all at once. Approximately 78% of deployers observed improvements in at least one team metric within 3 months.

Challenges this service solves

Even if you know that psychological safety is important, it is rare for organizations to have mechanisms to continuously measure and improve it. The annual survey does not capture the change and the improvement action does not continue. The PsychSafe Score automates monthly surveys and recommends specific actions to change psychological safety to a state where it can be measured and improved.

Unique 4-axis evaluation

Edmondson's 7-item scale is measured in 4 axes (frankness, challenge tolerance, support density, and fairness) improved for Japanese companies. Track time-series changes on each axis to visualize trends across your organization, by team, and by individual.

Implementation Track Record

We have a track record of implementation in various industries such as SaaS companies, financial institutions, and manufacturing. In particular, it is often deployed in engineering organizations and contributes to the psychological safety of the development team.

acf.subtitle: Quantify your team's psychological safety
acf.features: Automatic monthly surveys | Automatic monthly delivery of 4-axis surveys that guarantee anonymity. Automated reminders to improve response rates. Also supports responses from Slack/Teams. Org Chart Heatmap | Visualize your team hierarchy and identify teams at risk at a glance. It also has a built-in reporting function to management. Suggested Improvement Actions | Automatically recommend specific actions based on scoring patterns from our internal knowledge. Effect measurement after action execution is also possible. API/SSO support | Works with major tools such as Slack/Microsoft Teams/Okta/Google Workspace. SAML 2. 0/OIDC compliant. Comparison and benchmarking | Comparisons with historical company data, industry averages, and companies of the same size are possible. Evaluate the appropriateness of improvement objectively. Manager Dashboard | A dedicated screen where each manager can see their team's score and improvement actions.
acf.pricing_plans:
Starter | From ¥30,000 per month | Up to 50 people, basic survey, email support, monthly report
Growth | From ¥80,000 per month | Up to 200 people, custom survey, org chart heatmap, Slack/Teams integration, manager training
Enterprise | Contact Us | Unlimited, SSO, Dedicated Customer Success, SLA Guarantee, Monthly Review Session, Custom Metrics
acf.faq:
Is the answer really anonymous? | Yes, individual responses are not linked to anyone, including management.Teams with less than 5 people will be excluded from aggregation.Answer data is stored encrypted in AES-256.
How long will it take to implement? | Minimum 2 weeks.Approximately 3-4 weeks if SSO integration is included.Adoption support will be accompanied by a dedicated person in charge.
Can I transfer from an existing survey tool? | Past data can be handed over with the CSV importer.You can do continuous time series analysis from the first time.
How long can I maintain my response rate? | Maintains an average of 80% or more.We prevent survey fatigue by automating reminders, reducing response time (within 3 minutes), and displaying feedback after response.
Can I use it at overseas bases? | Available in English, Chinese, Swedish, and German.Lots of experience operating in a multilingual environment.
